name: genesis-conductor-site
description: genesis-conductor-site: SEO-optimized landing site for the Genesis Conductor Engine by Igor Holt (@invariantx). Next.js 14 App Router + TypeScript production landing page with crawl-friendly architecture, built-in metadata routes (robots.txt, sitemap.xml, web manifest), Open Graph, Twitter cards, JSON-LD structured data for organization and software application entities, canonical URL handling. Includes integrated marketing/SEO strategy docs for Genesis Conductor, LidLift, SEAR (portfolio authority, technical SEO, AI-search visibility). Deploys to Cloudflare Workers via OpenNext adapter with CI/CD. The public face and GEO/SEO hub for the entire Genesis Conductor ecosystem of autonomous agents, thermodynamic verification (S-ToT), A2A, MCP, Diamond-V, Yennefer, OpenClaw skills, and multi-tenant platforms. Essential for discoverability of @invariantx's Genesis Conductor work.

plugins.name: genesis-conductor-landing
plugins.description: Official SEO-optimized landing site and marketing surface for Genesis Conductor Engine. Next.js 14 with App Router, full metadata/structured data/OG/sitemap support, Cloudflare Workers deployment. Hosts product thesis and links to Yennefer, Diamond-V, vivarium, arbiter, seismic-log, OpenClaw skills, and the full thermodynamic/A2A/MCP/autonomous agent stack by @invariantx. Includes portfolio SEO strategy documentation.
